title: Onboarding - Eula page - App in the background
scenario: EULA page animation stops working when app is sent to background and reopened during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (fresh install or after clearing data).
2. Proceed through the initial setup screens until reaching the EULA (End User License Agreement) page.

3. Observe the EULA page: verify the license agreement text is displayed, Privacy Policy and License Agreement links are clickable, the Continue button is blurred (disabled), and the background animation is working.
4. Press the Home button or switch to another app to send Poly Studio Mobile to the background.
6. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app from the recent apps list or home screen.
expected: The app remains on the same EULA page with the license agreement text, clickable Privacy Policy and License Agreement links, blurred Continue button, and the animation still working.
